name: Before a great golden tree
description:
You stand before a huge golden tree, the largest in all of Lothlorien.  This
glorious tree is home to the ancient elves Celeborn and Galadriel.  Flets dot
the tree from level to level, and near the very top sits a huge house-like
structure.  Elven guards and sentries patrol the flets above.  Higher still,
various elven guests are visible as they stand on the balconies looking out
over the siege.
